note: Live CPU inference proven via `visionservex openmmlab smoke-test <id> --device cpu --image ... --json` inside the OpenMMLab Docker sidecar. mmpose/mmdet Inferencer aliases auto-download Apache-2.0 checkpoints (no pre-mounted weights). rtmpose-m is a registry model -> promoted to INFERENCE_READY_LIVE_SIDECAR (see v321_sidecar_matrix.json). The two rtmdet-*-coco detect ids are CLI-only smoke ids (NOT in the VisionModel registry), recorded here as capability evidence only; they are NOT promoted in model_capabilities.

results.evidence: 17 body keypoints + bbox returned on examples/images/person.jpg
mmdet DetInferencer auto-downloaded RTMDet-tiny and returned COCO boxes/scores/labels on CPU
mmdet DetInferencer auto-downloaded RTMDet-l and returned COCO boxes/scores/labels on CPU

blocked_in_same_family.rtmdet-r-*/rtmdet-r2-* (obb/rotated): mmrotate 0.3.4 requires mmdet 2.x / mmcv-full 1.x, incompatible with the mmcv 2.1 sidecar stack. Blocker reproduced in smoke-test obb branch (OBB_INFERENCER_UNAVAILABLE). Stays CATALOG_ONLY/PARTIAL until a RotatedDetInferencer shim or mmrotate 1.x (mmcv 2.x) lands.
blocked_in_same_family.rtmpose-{t,s,l,m-384x288,l-384x288}: Only the rtmpose-m checkpoint is wired for auto-download (pose2d=human alias). The other variants' specific weights are not individually exercised, so they stay at their honest current state (not promoted).
